CustomField.label: Mode
CustomField.description: Value mode for this category in the Universal Budget grid: Currency (default) tracks money via the Amount field; Quantity tracks counts via the Quantity field; Percent tracks percentages via the Percent field with a hard 100% cap per row. Modes mix freely within one budget.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: How this category's values behave: Currency (money), Quantity (counts), or Percent (0-100, capped at 100% per row across periods).
